description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a long barrel and a cylindrical suppressor attached to the muzzle. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine, all of which are standard for contemporary semi-automatic or automatic rifles. The upper receiver has a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of various optics or accessories, though no sighting system is currently mounted. The handguard is slim and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, providing ample space for grip and accessory mounting. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, likely aluminum alloy, with polymer components for the stock, grip, and magazine. This rifle is designed for urban tactical scenarios, offering modularity and adaptability for different operational needs.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a suppressor, collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and a full-length rail for accessories. It features a sleek, modular design with both metal and polymer components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the slim, linear alignment of the rifle's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and overall structure, mirroring the other side.
